title: lichen_make_ula/gua share identical structure - consider unifying
description:
ipv6_addr.c:132-168: lichen_make_ula() and lichen_make_gua() have identical structure differing only in the prefix validation predicate. Could be:

static int make_prefixed_addr(const uint8_t *prefix, const uint8_t *iid, struct in6_addr *addr, bool (*validate)(uint8_t))

Or keep both for API clarity - the current form is not wrong, just slightly redundant. Low priority since the functions are small.
close_reason: P3 observations acknowledged, no fix needed
